query:
-- Services revenue status
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withRevenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zeroRevenue,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM services
WHERE status = 'active';

-- Aus Ships: find the customer and their billing items
SELECT c.externalId, c.name, c.billingPlatforms
FROM customers c
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Aus Ship%' OR c.name LIKE '%AusShip%' OR c.name LIKE '%Australian Ship%';
